Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»PICTURES: Top 12 photos as Team SA celebrates 4x100m relay silver

Akani Simbine ran the anchor leg of the men’s 4x100m relay to help carry South Africa to the silver medal at the 2024 Paris Olympics.

Akani Simbineran the anchor leg of the men’s4x100m relayto help carrySouth Africaacross the line to the silver medal at the2024 Paris Olympicson Friday.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

The rest of the South African relay team comprised Bayanda Walaza, Shaun Maswanganyi and Bradley Nkoana.

The 4x100m relay medal was Team SA’sfifthof the Games and put them into 40th place in the medal table.

Canadatook gold withGreat Britainin third.

Pre-race favourites, the USA, were disqualified.

Below, and above, the12best pictures from the race (from a South African point of view … )

description: Akani Simbine ran the anchor leg of the men’s 4x100m relay to help carry South Africa to the silver medal at the 2024 Paris Olympics.
